name: auto-fetch Room/Block/Warden on student select + live duration
script: frappe.ui.form.on("Hostel Visitor Log", { student: function(frm) { if (!frm.doc.student) return; frappe.db.get\_list("Hostel Admission", { filters: { student: frm.doc.student, admission\_status: "Checked In" }, fields: ["hostel", "hostel\_block", "hostel\_room"], limit: 1 }).then(records => { if (!records.length) { frappe.msgprint("No active (Checked In) admission found for this student."); return; } let a = records[0]; frm.set\_value("hostel", a.hostel); frm.set\_value("student\_room", a.hostel\_room); // fetch the on-duty warden for that hostel frappe.db.get\_value("Warden", { hostel: a.hostel, status: "Active" }, "name") .then(({message}) => { if (message && message.name) { frm.set\_value("warden", message.name); } }); }); }, entry\_time: function(frm) { if (!frm.doc.entry\_time) { frm.set\_value("entry\_time", frappe.datetime.now\_datetime()); } }, exit\_time: function(frm) { if (frm.doc.entry\_time && frm.doc.exit\_time) { let mins = frappe.datetime.get\_minute\_diff(frm.doc.exit\_time, frm.doc.entry\_time); if (mins < 0) { frappe.msgprint("Exit Time cannot be before Entry Time."); frm.set\_value("exit\_time", ""); return; } let hrs = Math.floor(mins / 60); let rem = mins % 60; frm.set\_value("visit\_duration", `${hrs}h ${rem}m`); } }, refresh(frm) { if (frm.is\_new() && !frm.doc.entry\_time) { frm.set\_value("entry\_time", frappe.datetime.now\_datetime()); } } });
